summary: Production readiness audit for RMS. Fixed CRITICAL BUG: 'Cannot access loadContacts before initialization' in contacts.tsx. All 5 production readiness items verified: 1) emergency-reset endpoint REMOVED, 2) Login works, 3) Contacts API with sort_by/view_mode/search works, 4) Email signature fields in brand context, 5) MongoDB indexes defined, 6) Photo backfill uses asyncio.create_task, 7) Race condition fix with requestSeq implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: 'Cannot access loadContacts before initialization' - loadContacts was defined with useCallback AFTER it was referenced in useEffect and useFocusEffect hooks
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Moved loadContacts useCallback definition BEFORE the useEffect and useFocusEffect hooks that reference it

critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: emergency-reset endpoint successfully REMOVED - POST returns 404
server.py lines 621-659: ~20 MongoDB indexes defined for contacts, conversations, messages, campaign_enrollments, notifications, tags
contacts.py line 494: Photo backfill correctly uses asyncio.create_task() for background processing
email_template.py lines 35-47: get_brand_context includes sender_title, sender_phone, sender_email, sender_photo, card_url
email_template.py lines 131-230: build_branded_email includes full signature block with photo, name, title, phone, email, digital card link
contacts.tsx: requestSeq counter implemented correctly for race condition prevention (lines 71, 128, 134, 140, 159, 161)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production readiness audit complete. All 5 items verified. Fixed critical bug in contacts.tsx where loadContacts was referenced before initialization. The fix moved the useCallback definition before the hooks that use it.

contacts_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?sort_by=rece: PASS - returns contacts sorted by recent activity
contacts_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?view_mode=te: PASS - returns team contacts for managers
contacts_api.GET /api/contacts/{user_id}?search=test: PASS - filters contacts by search term

photo_backfill_async.asyncio.create_task: PASS - used for background photo backfill

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS - send_sms returns mock success

bug_fix_details.root_cause: loadContacts was defined with useCallback at line 124, but referenced in useEffect (line 75) and useFocusEffect (line 85) BEFORE its definition
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Moved loadContacts useCallback definition to line 73 (before the hooks that reference it)
bug_fix_details.verification: Contacts page now loads without errors, rapid tab switching works correctly
